news.t: Pacer ETFs Announces Transition of QDPL and QSIX to Monthly Dividend Distributions
Pacer ETFs Celebrates Rapid Growth in 2021, Crosses the $10 Billion AUM Mark as It Sets Stage For 2022
Pacer ETFs Launches 2 Dividend ETFs in Partnership With Metaurus Advisors

holdings.infoBox: QDPL is an equity ETF with a total of 522 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.21%, Apple at 6.08%, Microsoft at 4.15%, Future on S&P 500 at 4.02%, and Future on S&P 500 at 4.00%.

overview.description: The Pacer Metaurus US Large Cap Dividend Multiplier 400 ETF (QDPL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks an index based on the stocks in the S&P 500 Index, long S&P Dividend futures and 3-year Treasurys. The objective is to provide 400% of the ordinary yield of the S&P 500 Index in exchange for reduced participation in the price performance. QDPL was launched on Jul 12, 2021 and is issued by Pacer.
infoTable: Metaurus US Large Cap Dividend Multiplier Index - Series 400

data.title: Pacer ETFs Announces Transition of QDPL and QSIX to Monthly Dividend Distributions
data.text: MALVERN, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $QDPL #Dividend--Pacer ETFs announces transition to monthly distributions for QSIX, QDPL funds.

data.text: MALVERN, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Pacer ETFs (“Pacer”), an ETF provider that offers strategy-driven, rules-based ETFs, has grown assets under management to $10.2 billion, a 76% increase from Dec. 31, 202...

data.title: Pacer ETFs Launches 2 Dividend ETFs in Partnership With Metaurus Advisors
data.text: MALVERN, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Pacer ETFs debuts two dividend ETFs in partnership with Metaurus Advisors.
